title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oberoi Hotels! We are hiring a Reservation Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oberoi Hotels:
Oberoi Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
